subcodes.first_line: O servants and handmaidens of the Loving Lord! The blessed personage, together with all members of his household, is embraced within the glance of divine favor and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و اماء رب ودود حضرت مسعود با جمیع خاندان موجود مشمول نظر عنایتند و
